posts.text:
🚨BREAKING: The Left’s mission to CENSOR and BLACKLIST anyone who utters the name of Jesus has FAILED.

Thanks to people like Charlie Kirk, who literally put his life on the line for his faith, Gen-Z is flooding back into church.

We will never forget you, Charlie. RIP.

Video

🚨BREAKING: Corrupt ex-FBI Director James Comey was just SUBPOENAED in the Trump DOJ's "Grand Conspiracy" probe overseen by Judge Aileen Cannon.

Comey needs to be held responsible.

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: President Trump just shared 1929 footage of New York City before it was flooded with illegal aliens of foreigners.

God bless Trump for deporting illegals and MAKING AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: NYC voters OUTRAGED after NYC was exposed for spending more taxpayer money on EACH HOMELESS PERSON more than the city's average income.

This is surely more FRAUD!

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: Sen. Mike Lee just EXPOSED the Democrats for wanting to "make it so easy to vote that they're willing to make it easier to cheat?"

God bless @BasedMikeLee!

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨NICK SHIRLEY: “The Governor of California is an enemy to the people of California. He’s literally working to support the fraudsters. He could be working to expose the fraud.”

God bless @NickShirleyy!

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

I just gave @NICKIMINAJ a HUGE shoutout LIVE on Fox News!

Nicki, the greatest female rapper of all time, has put Bible verses in some of her latest music.

Thanks to leaders like Nicki & President Trump,

Gen-Z is waking up and becoming more Christian than ANY OTHER generation.

Video

🚨BEAUTIFUL: Japan's new conservative Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi just ran up to President Trump and gave him a BIG HUG!

This is so precious!

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: Japan's Conservative PM Sanae Takaichi just IMPRESSED President Trump with her ability to understand English.

"Do you understand? Very good, I'll tell you."

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: Gen-Z is now MORE ENGAGED in Church than Boomers, per a new Barna study.

This is thanks to President Trump platforming JESUS and welcoming Gen-Z to talk about God.

God bless you, Mr. Best President.

Thank you!

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

Don't believe the fake news attacks on @TulsiGabbard.

Leftists and RINOs are attacking her because she was on-site when the Trump FBI seized Fulton County, GA 2020 ballots.

The STOLEN 2020 election will be exposed!

God bless Trump and Tulsi.🙏

Video

🚨BREAKING: Kamala Harris just insinuated Queen of Rap @NICKIMINAJ doesn’t know “2 + 2 = 4” and only supports President Trump because of “misinformation.”

Kamala, this is why both times you ran for President you lost badly.

Nicki is much smarter than you.

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: The incredible @DBongino just DESTROYED Leftists and RINOs on LIVE TV.

"You do not know jack SQUAT about this guy [Trump] if you think he is getting dog walked by anyone. He’s the one WALKING the damn dog!"

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: Plane fulls of illegal aliens are being deported and flying out of Minneapois to where they came from thanks to ICE's deportations.

This is what I voted for!

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

I'm so looking forward to going on Fox & Friends First tomorrow morning.

Gen-Z supports President Trump more now than ever before.

Make sure to tune in!

🚨BREAKING: The House of Representatives just PASSED a bill that requires the AUTOMATIC DEPORTATION of any illegal alien that commits welfare fraud.

This is what I voted for!

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: CNN just ADMITTED President Trump has a 100% APPROVAL RATING with the MAGA GOP.

In addition, the MAGA GOP has GROWN since November 2024.

Congratulations, Mr. Best President!

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: Over 2.2 MILLION people have seen @JamesOKeefeIII's BOMBSHELL investigation on X alone exposing FRAUD cash for ballots.

This is just PART 1! The mainstream media is, of course, ignoring this.

Share to make this GO VIRAL!

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: VP @JDVance just DOUBLED DOWN on the SAVE America Act and put a fake news reporter in their place.

"If what you mean by intervening in the election is we want voter ID before voting in this country? Yes!"

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BEAUTIFUL: Sen. Mullin just told a heart-touching story of how President Trump called countless times, offered his personal plane, and even personally visited  his son in 2020 after a traumatic brain injury.

God bless Trump.

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video
